  - Add p5-Nexmo-SMS 0.03

  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Nexmo-SMS/
  
  PR:             ports/162865
  Submitted by:   Jui-Nan Lin <jnlin@csie.nctu.edu.tw>
  Feature safe:   yes
